items.quote: You are not the sum of your worries, but the bearer of a name known by God.
items.context: Identity is received before it is achieved.
items.reflection: Where have I confused my roles with my worth?

items.quote: Belovedness is the ground that does not move when all else shakes.
items.context: Security flows from being loved first.
items.reflection: How would I act today if I truly believed I am beloved?

items.quote: Your true self grows quiet enough to hear the gentle voice.
items.context: Noise blurs identity; quiet restores it.
items.reflection: What can I subtract to hear clearly again?

items.quote: Faith is a lifted gaze more than a clenched fist.
items.reflection: Where is my attention drawn today—fear or Presence?

items.quote: When you cannot see the path, walk with the One who lights the next step.
items.context: Guidance is often lamp, not floodlight.
items.reflection: What is my very next faithful step?

items.quote: Surrender is not defeat but alignment.
items.reflection: What small surrender would free me now?

items.context: Gentle practices re-script the nervous system.
items.reflection: What kindness can I offer my body today?

items.quote: Healing is rhythm: rest, nourish, move, repeat.
items.reflection: Which rhythm is missing this week?

items.quote: Forgiveness unclenches the hand that grips the wound.
items.reflection: Who or what needs my gentle release?

items.quote: Hope is remembering a larger story.
items.context: Reframe: today is a page, not the book.
items.reflection: What larger story holds this moment?
Where might hidden growth be occurring?
What truth can I tell gently today?
